seams: H-STYLE-ROBUST (primary): at matched truth and matched content, NSM-shaped vs plain surface changes judge acceptance by no more than +/-0.10 absolute (TOST equivalence) for the pinned judge pool on the tier-2 kernel-bytes pairs; if true, f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings are not materially style/familiarity-leaky at this margin

H-STYLE-LEAKY (the alternative under test, symmetric): the style main effect exceeds the +/-0.10 margin (either direction); if demonstrated, every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement reading (including f2b-transfer-llmproxy A1p=0.95) carries a measured style-bias band and cannot be read as pure content endorsement

H-FALSE-ACCEPT-INFLATION (Holm secondary, the live threat named by the llmproxy envelope / ASM-0021): NSM shaping RAISES acceptance of semantically WRONG content (one-sided style effect on truth-wrong tier-2 cells > 0) — the exact channel that would fabricate endorsement under H-CIRC

H-INSTRUMENT (gate, never a hypothesis outcome): judges separate own from deranged definitions on kernel-free external gold (tier-1 wn31 truth effect >= 0.30), the tier-2 style manipulation is real (>=0.80 pair-difference), labels are stable (retest >= 0.85) — failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID
summary: Experiment truthstyle-2x2: verdict PASS. Hypotheses: H-STYLE-ROBUST (primary): at matched truth and matched content, NSM-shaped vs plain surface changes judge acceptance by no more than +/-0.10 absolute (TOST equivalence) for the pinned judge pool on the tier-2 kernel-bytes pairs; if true, f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings are not materially style/familiarity-leaky at this margin, H-STYLE-LEAKY (the alternative under test, symmetric): the style main effect exceeds the +/-0.10 margin (either direction); if demonstrated, every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement reading (including f2b-transfer-llmproxy A1p=0.95) carries a measured style-bias band and cannot be read as pure content endorsement, H-FALSE-ACCEPT-INFLATION (Holm secondary, the live threat named by the llmproxy envelope / ASM-0021): NSM shaping RAISES acceptance of semantically WRONG content (one-sided style effect on truth-wrong tier-2 cells > 0) — the exact channel that would fabricate endorsement under H-CIRC, H-INSTRUMENT (gate, never a hypothesis outcome): judges separate own from deranged definitions on kernel-free external gold (tier-1 wn31 truth effect >= 0.30), the tier-2 style manipulation is real (>=0.80 pair-difference), labels are stable (retest >= 0.85) — failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID. Endpoints: primary(primary)=0.025; sec-wrong-cell-inflation(secondary)=False; sec-correct-cell-tost(secondary)=False; sec-judge1p-tost(secondary)=True; sec-label-coverage-gate(secondary)=True; sec-pool-gate(secondary)=True; sec-truth-manipulation-gate(secondary)=True; sec-style-fidelity-gate(secondary)=True; sec-length-match-gate(secondary)=True; sec-retest-gate(secondary)=True. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): truthstyle-2x2 kills (all on the tier-2 primary estimand, concept-cluster bootstrap B=10000 seed 20260710, margin +/-0.10 absolute): (a) STYLE-LEAK KILL — the 90% interval (two one-sided 95% bounds) of the style main effect lies entirely beyond +0.10 or entirely below -0.10 => FAIL = style-leaky: every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement reading (f2b-transfer-llmproxy A1p = 0.95 included, and — under the FORK-4 format-transfer stipulation — the pending human Stage-1 A) must thereafter carry this record's measured interval as a style-bias band; this kills the 'judge endorsement reads as pure content endorsement' interpretation at this judge class, NOT any frozen record and NOT the kernel-content claim itself. (b) EQUIVALENCE — TOST pass (interval inside the margin) => PASS = style-robust at margin 0.10 for THIS pool/format; the style-leak guard is lifted at that margin and no further. (c) NEITHER => INCONCLUSIVE, and the PRE-DECLARED CONSERVATIVE CONSUMER RULE holds: the guard stays in force — an underpowered straddle can never be cited as reassurance. Degeneracy discipline: label-coverage, pool inversion, truth-manipulation (kernel-free tier-1 gold), style-fidelity (manipulation strength 0.94 measured at build; gate 0.80), length-match, and retest failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates — they can never read as PASS, FAIL, or NULL. Nulls require TOST (this record's primary IS the TOST). Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Binding on any verdict. R0 — no host model, no rung claims, scale_language none. A PASS licenses exactly: for THIS pinned 3-LLM judge pool (GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.5, Claude-Haiku-4.5; two of three same-vendor, disclosed), under the S1 fit+identification standards WITH the S6 register-immunity instruction (the condition actually in force on the f2b line), in single-stimulus yes/no/cannot-say acceptance format, on d-ts (100 covered-concept canonical glosses vs their pinned S6-inverse plainifications, and 96 wn31 words vs a MEASURED-near-null tier-1 transform that carries NO endpoint), the style main effect on acceptance at matched truth is within +/-0.10 absolute — and the style-leak guard on f2b-line LLM-JUDGE endorsement readings is lifted AT THAT MARGIN. It does NOT license: any claim that kernel content is correct (no endpoint scores gold agreement); any H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC adjudication (that is f2b-transfer's alone); transfer to HUMAN judges (registered extrapolation, FORK-3 — the pending human Stage-1 A is NOT cleared by this probe); transfer to the f2b MCQ/best-fit format beyond the FORK-4 STIPULATION (single-stimulus acceptance is a different judging act; resolution path = MCQ successor if LEAKY); margins tighter than 0.10 (FORK-5); other style transforms, other concepts, other corpora, or any coverage-general claim — kernel-expressibility coverage is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on ONE incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily; the tier-2 concepts are 100 of those same 108 covered concepts and nothing here extends coverage. A FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it establishes a style-bias band for THIS judge class on THIS format; it amends no frozen record and does not by itself refute kernel content (a style-leaky judge is an instrument fact about judges). The tier-2 truth split rests on the STIPULATED own-gloss-is-correct reading (design doc section 6.1); the primary pools both truth levels so no verdict rests on that stipulation.
title: Registry verdict: truthstyle-2x2
